extracted_via: Claude Code (CodemIE) + Jira REST API v2 (Bearer Token)
ai_tools_used: Claude Code via CodemIE — architecture, test design, test case generation
Official Atlassian Remote MCP (mcp.atlassian.com) — Jira connectivity setup
Jira REST API v2 — live story extraction with Bearer token

stories.summary: InvenTree Parts API – CRUD Operations

description.summary: Enable authenticated clients to perform create, retrieve, update, and delete operations on individual Parts via the API.
description.general_description: Parts form the core entities of the system. The API will allow clients to manage part records, ensuring business constraints, field validation, and relational links are respected.
description.business_value: Allows seamless integration and automation of part management from external systems, ensuring inventory accuracy and compliance.
preconditions: Valid part categories exist for assignment.

scenarios.name: Create Part
scenarios.when: a POST request with all required part fields and valid attributes is sent to /api/part/
scenarios.then: the part is created, returned with 201 status, and the part record is accessible

description.expected_result: CRUD endpoints allow for full part lifecycle operations, with validation and business rule enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: Create, retrieve, update, delete operations function as specified.
Invalid payloads are rejected with descriptive errors.
All required fields must be present; nullable and immutable fields are enforced.
Unauthorized or unauthenticated requests are rejected.

stories.summary: InvenTree Parts API – List, Filtering, Pagination, and Search

description.summary: Support listing, filtering, searching, and pagination of parts via API to optimize large inventory queries.
description.general_description: Expose endpoints to list parts with optional filters on fields, with paginated responses and search capability as per API schema.
description.business_value: Promotes efficient querying and enables integration workflows for inventory analytics and import/export.

scenarios.name: List Parts
scenarios.when: a GET request is sent to /api/part/
scenarios.then: a paginated list of all parts is returned

description.expected_result: List endpoint responds with paginated, filtered, and searched results as specified.
acceptance_criteria: Filtering, searching, and pagination operate as documented.
Metadata for pagination and filter links are included.
Invalid or excessive filters are rejected/ignored gracefully.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part Categories API

description.summary: Enable full management of part category hierarchy, including CRUD and parent/child relationships via API.
description.general_description: Part categories are exposed via dedicated endpoints for creation, viewing, updating, deleting, and retrieving hierarchy, supporting nesting and relational integrity.
description.business_value: Ensures accurate organization and grouping of parts, allowing efficient category management and reporting.

scenarios.name: Create Category
scenarios.when: a POST request with valid category fields is sent to /api/part/category/

description.expected_result: Full lifecycle management of categories, preserving hierarchy and referential integrity.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD operations enforce hierarchy rules and prevent orphaned part references.
Invalid, duplicate, or cyclical parent assignment is rejected.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part Parameters API

description.summary: Support management of parameters for parts, including creation, editing, retrieval, and deletion via API.
description.general_description: Expose endpoints for adding, updating, removing parameter values from parts, which may be used for technical, commercial, or search purposes.
description.business_value: Allows granular description and specification of parts, promoting complex inventory use-cases (e.g., parametric search, compliance).

scenarios.name: Add Parameter to Part
scenarios.when: a POST request with parameter data is sent to /api/part/{id}/parameter/
scenarios.then: the parameter is added and linked to the part

description.expected_result: Parameter management endpoints allow precise control of part specifications.
acceptance_criteria: Parameters enforce uniqueness and data type.
Invalid or duplicate parameter addition is rejected.
Parameter deletion cascades correctly.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part Templates & Variants API

description.summary: Allow management of template parts and their variant relationships via dedicated API endpoints.
description.general_description: Templates define common metadata for variant parts, with APIs for assigning, tracking, and managing variant-to-template links.
description.business_value: Promotes efficient configuration and variant tracking for families of parts, reducing duplication and improving traceability.

scenarios.name: Set Part as Template
scenarios.when: a PATCH request updates a part with template=true
scenarios.then: the part is marked as template

description.expected_result: Templates and variant APIs enforce relationships and constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Variants reference template parts only.
Template deletion checks for variant existence and blocks if necessary.
Circular or invalid template assignment is rejected.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part Revisions API

description.summary: Enable assignment and management of part revisions via API, enforcing business constraints.
description.general_description: Expose endpoints for creating revisions, updating revision fields, and linking parts to revision histories with strict integrity checks.
description.business_value: Supports controlled lifecycle and traceability for part changes, ensuring compliance and reducing errors from revision mismanagement.

scenarios.name: Create Revision
scenarios.when: a PATCH request updates a part with revision_of referencing another part
scenarios.then: a revision is created, and revision-of-revision is prevented

description.expected_result: Revisions are created and managed according to business constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Revision linkages are validated for uniqueness and circular prevention.
Inactive revisions or duplicate codes are rejected.
Revision listing matches history.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part BOM (Bill of Materials) API

description.summary: Enable BOM assignment and management for parts via API, supporting multi-level and component links.
description.general_description: Endpoints permit adding/removing BOM items (component parts) to parent parts, enforcing assembly/component role constraints and BOM structure validity.
description.business_value: Supports manufacturing and production workflows, allowing accurate BOM tracking and updates across inventory.

scenarios.name: Add BOM Item
scenarios.when: a POST request with component part and quantity is sent to /api/part/{id}/bom/
scenarios.then: BOM line is created and linked to parent part

description.expected_result: BOM endpoints allow comprehensive management with assembly/component checks.
acceptance_criteria: BOM item must reference valid parts.
Duplicate or invalid BOM assignments are blocked.
Assembly/component flags are validated.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part Attachments API

description.summary: Permit file attachment upload, retrieval, and removal for parts via API.
description.general_description: Endpoints allow parts to be associated with documents, images, or PDFs for compliance or reference.
description.business_value: Enables traceable document storage per part, helping engineering, compliance, and quality workflows.

scenarios.name: Upload Attachment
scenarios.when: a POST request with valid file is sent to /api/part/{id}/attachment/
scenarios.then: attachment is uploaded and linked to part

description.expected_result: Attachment endpoints allow secure upload, retrieval and removal per part.
acceptance_criteria: Attachment upload enforces size and type limits.
Attachments are deleted from system storage.
Invalid files are rejected.

stories.summary: InvenTree Related Parts API

description.summary: Enable management of related parts links via API for referencing substitutes or complementary items.
description.general_description: API endpoints allow creation, listing, and removal of part-to-part relationships.
description.business_value: Supports enhanced search, alternative provisioning, and compatibility checks for inventory.

scenarios.name: Add Related Part
scenarios.when: a POST request with related part ID is sent to /api/part/{id}/related/

description.expected_result: The related parts API maintains valid cross-references.
acceptance_criteria: Self-references or circular links are blocked.
Duplicate related links are prevented.

stories.summary: InvenTree Part Custom Fields & Attributes API

description.summary: Expose endpoints for managing custom fields and business attributes (trackable, virtual, assembly, component, purchaseable, salable, units, etc.) via API.
description.general_description: API will support creation and editing of attributes per documented schema, ensuring that all business rules are enforced for each flag.
description.business_value: Permits deep customization and compliance for parts, supporting advanced inventory models.

scenarios.name: Update Attributes
scenarios.when: a PATCH request with supported attribute flags and units is sent to /api/part/{id}/

description.expected_result: Part records accurately reflect custom attributes, and unsupported assignments are blocked.
acceptance_criteria: All business flags/attributes can be set and updated.
Invalid, conflicting, or unsupported attribute combinations are rejected.
Units of measure supported as per system configuration.

stories.summary: API: Validate Required Fields for Part Creation

description.summary: Validate required field enforcement for Part creation via API.
description.general_description: The API must enforce all required fields during Part creation and return descriptive validation errors when mandatory fields are missing or invalid.
description.business_value: Ensures data integrity and prevents incomplete part records from being created in the inventory system.
preconditions: Knowledge of required fields from schema (name, category, etc.)

scenarios.name: Create Part without required 'name' field
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/ is sent without the 'name' field

description.expected_result: API enforces required field validation with clear error messages.
acceptance_criteria: Missing required fields result in 400 status with field-specific error messages
Empty or whitespace-only values for required fields are rejected
Response clearly identifies which field(s) failed validation
Valid requests with all required fields succeed with 201

stories.summary: API: Validate Max Length Constraints for Part Fields

description.summary: Validate field length constraints (max length) for Part fields via API.
description.general_description: API must enforce maximum character length limits on text fields and reject requests exceeding these limits with clear error messages.
description.business_value: Prevents database constraint violations and ensures data consistency across the system.
preconditions: Schema defines max lengths for fields (e.g., name, description, IPN)

scenarios.name: Create Part with name exceeding max length
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/ is sent with name field exceeding max length (e.g., 300 characters when max is 100)

description.expected_result: All text fields enforce max length with descriptive errors.
acceptance_criteria: Fields exceeding max length are rejected with 400 status
Error message specifies which field and the max length allowed
Fields at exactly max length are accepted
Validation applies to both POST (create) and PATCH (update) operations

stories.summary: API: Validate Nullable Field Constraints for Parts

description.summary: Validate nullable vs non-nullable field constraints for Part API operations.
description.general_description: API must correctly enforce nullable field rules, allowing null values only for optional fields while rejecting null for required fields.
description.business_value: Ensures schema compliance and prevents null-pointer exceptions or data integrity issues.
preconditions: Schema defines which fields are nullable

scenarios.name: Set nullable field to null
scenarios.when: a POST/PATCH request sets the field to null

description.expected_result: Nullable constraints are enforced correctly per schema definition.
acceptance_criteria: Nullable fields accept null values without error
Non-nullable fields reject null with 400 status
Optional fields can be omitted in requests
Error messages clearly identify non-nullable constraint violations

stories.summary: API: Validate Read-Only Field Protection for Parts

description.summary: Validate read-only field protection in Part API update operations.
description.general_description: API must prevent modification of read-only fields (e.g., id, creation date, calculated fields) and reject or ignore attempts to update them.
description.business_value: Protects system-managed data from corruption and maintains audit trail integrity.

scenarios.name: Attempt to modify read-only 'id' field
scenarios.when: a PATCH request to /api/part/123/ attempts to change id to 456

description.expected_result: Read-only fields cannot be modified via API.
acceptance_criteria: Attempts to modify read-only fields result in 400 error or are silently ignored
Read-only fields include: id, pk, creation date, last updated by system
Writable fields can be updated normally
Documentation clearly marks read-only fields

stories.summary: API: Enforce Unique IPN Constraint for Parts

description.summary: Enforce unique Internal Part Number (IPN) constraint via API to prevent duplicate IPN creation.
description.general_description: The API must validate IPN uniqueness across all parts and reject creation or update attempts that would create duplicate IPNs.
description.business_value: Prevents inventory confusion, maintains data integrity, and ensures unique part identification.
preconditions: IPN field is defined as unique in schema
At least one part with IPN exists

scenarios.name: Create part with duplicate IPN
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/ is sent with IPN="ABC-123"

description.expected_result: IPN uniqueness is enforced across all parts.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate IPN creation/update attempts return 400 with clear error
IPN comparison is case-insensitive (or per business rules)
Null IPNs are allowed if field is optional, multiple nulls permitted
Error message identifies the conflicting IPN value

stories.summary: API: Validate Part Attribute Flags and Combinations

description.summary: Validate all Part attribute flags (Virtual, Template, Assembly, Component, Trackable, Purchaseable, Salable, Active) via API.
description.general_description: API must correctly handle boolean attribute flags, enforce business rules for flag combinations, and reject invalid or conflicting attribute states.
description.business_value: Ensures parts are properly classified for inventory operations, purchasing, sales, and manufacturing workflows.
preconditions: Business rules for attribute combinations defined

scenarios.name: Set part as Template
scenarios.when: a POST/PATCH request sets template=true

description.expected_result: All attribute flags are validated and enforced per business rules.
acceptance_criteria: All boolean attributes can be set individually
Invalid attribute combinations are rejected with descriptive errors
Inactive parts trigger appropriate workflow restrictions
Template parts can have variants linked to them
Assembly parts can have BOM structures

stories.summary: API: Validate Units of Measure for Parts

description.summary: Validate Units of Measure assignment and configuration for Parts via API.
description.general_description: API must support assignment of valid units of measure to parts and reject invalid or unsupported unit values.
description.business_value: Ensures accurate inventory tracking, stock calculations, and purchasing/sales operations with correct units.
preconditions: System has configured units of measure

scenarios.name: Assign valid unit of measure
scenarios.when: a POST request sets units="pcs"

description.expected_result: Units of measure are validated against configured system values.
acceptance_criteria: Only valid, system-configured units are accepted
Invalid units return 400 with list of valid options
Unit changes are logged/audited
Unit validation is case-insensitive (or per system config)

stories.summary: API: Prevent Circular References in Part Revisions

description.summary: Prevent circular reference creation in Part Revisions via API.
description.general_description: API must detect and prevent circular revision references (e.g., Part A revision of Part B, Part B revision of Part A) and reject revision-of-revision assignments.
description.business_value: Maintains revision integrity, prevents infinite loops, and ensures clear revision history lineage.

scenarios.name: Create direct circular reference
scenarios.given: Part A exists with revision_of=Part B
scenarios.when: a PATCH request sets Part B revision_of=Part A

description.expected_result: All circular and invalid revision references are prevented.
acceptance_criteria: Direct circular references are blocked
Revision-of-revision is prevented (only original parts can be revised)
Self-references are blocked
Error messages clearly explain the violation
Valid linear revision chains are supported

stories.summary: API: Enforce Unique Revision Codes per Part Family

description.summary: Enforce unique revision codes within revision chains via API.
description.general_description: API must validate that revision codes are unique within a revision family (original part and all its revisions) to prevent duplicate revision identification.
description.business_value: Ensures clear revision tracking and prevents confusion in version control.

scenarios.name: Create revision with duplicate code in same family
scenarios.when: a POST request creates Part C (revision of A) with revision code="v2"

description.expected_result: Revision codes are unique within each part's revision family.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate revision codes within same family are rejected
Revision codes can be reused across different part families
Error message identifies the conflicting code and part
Null/empty revision codes handled per business rules

stories.summary: API: Enforce Template-Only Revision Restriction

description.summary: Enforce that only Template parts can have revisions via API.
description.general_description: API must validate that revision_of can only reference parts marked as Template=true and reject revision assignments to non-template parts.
description.business_value: Enforces business rules for revision control and prevents improper revision hierarchies.
preconditions: Understanding of Template attribute and revision rules

scenarios.name: Create revision of non-template part
scenarios.when: a POST request creates Part B with revision_of=Part A

description.expected_result: Revision restrictions based on Template attribute are enforced.
acceptance_criteria: Only template=true parts can be referenced in revision_of
Attempts to create revisions of non-templates return 400
Cannot change template to false if part has revisions
Error messages clearly explain template-revision constraint

stories.summary: API: Enforce Inactive Part Operation Restrictions

description.summary: Enforce restrictions on operations involving inactive parts via API.
description.general_description: API must apply business rules that restrict certain operations (e.g., adding to BOM, purchasing, selling) on parts marked as inactive.
description.business_value: Prevents use of obsolete or discontinued parts in active operations while maintaining historical data.
preconditions: Parts exist with active=true and active=false states

scenarios.name: Attempt to add inactive part to BOM
scenarios.when: a POST request attempts to add Part A to Part B's BOM

description.expected_result: Inactive parts are restricted per business rules but remain queryable.
acceptance_criteria: Inactive parts cannot be added to new BOMs
Inactive parts cannot be used in new purchase/sales orders (if business rule applies)
Inactive parts can still be queried individually
Filtering by active status works correctly
Parts can be deactivated and reactivated

stories.summary: API: Validate Category Hierarchy and Prevent Orphaned References

description.summary: Validate category hierarchy creation, parent-child relationships, and prevent orphaned references via API.
description.general_description: API must support multi-level category hierarchies, validate parent references, and prevent deletion of categories that would orphan parts or child categories.
description.business_value: Ensures organized part categorization and prevents data integrity issues from broken category relationships.

scenarios.name: Create top-level category
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/category/ creates a category with parent=null

description.expected_result: Category hierarchy integrity is maintained.
acceptance_criteria: Multi-level hierarchies are supported
Invalid parent references are rejected
Categories with children cannot be deleted
Categories with assigned parts cannot be deleted
Circular parent references are prevented

stories.summary: API: Prevent Circular Parent References in Categories

description.summary: Prevent circular parent references in category hierarchy via API.
description.general_description: API must detect and block circular category references (e.g., Category A parent of B, B parent of C, C parent of A).
description.business_value: Prevents infinite loops in category traversal and maintains hierarchy integrity.

scenarios.name: Create direct circular reference
scenarios.when: a PATCH request sets Category B parent=Category A

description.expected_result: All circular category references are prevented.
acceptance_criteria: Direct and indirect circular references are detected and blocked
Self-references are prevented
Error messages clearly explain the circular path
Valid hierarchies of any depth are supported

stories.summary: API: Validate Template-Variant Relationships

description.summary: Validate template-variant relationships and prevent invalid variant assignments via API.
description.general_description: API must enforce that variants can only reference parts marked as template=true, and prevent circular or invalid variant relationships.
description.business_value: Ensures proper variant tracking and prevents misuse of template/variant feature.

scenarios.name: Create variant of template part
scenarios.when: a POST request creates Part B with variant_of=Part A

description.expected_result: Variant relationships are validated and enforced.
acceptance_criteria: Only template parts can have variants
Variants cannot have sub-variants
Cannot remove template flag if variants exist
Circular references are prevented
Variant listing returns all associated variants

stories.summary: API: Validate BOM Structure and Component Relationships

description.summary: Validate BOM component relationships and prevent invalid BOM assignments via API.
description.general_description: API must enforce that only assembly=true parts can have BOMs, validate component part references, prevent duplicate BOM items, and enforce quantity constraints.
description.business_value: Ensures accurate bill of materials structures for manufacturing and prevents invalid component assignments.

scenarios.name: Add BOM item to assembly part
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/bom/ adds Part B to Part A's BOM with quantity=5

description.expected_result: BOM structure validation prevents invalid assemblies.
acceptance_criteria: Only assembly parts can have BOM items
Duplicate components in same BOM are prevented
Quantities must be positive numbers
Component part references are validated
BOM items can be added, updated, deleted

stories.summary: API: Validate Parameter Templates and Part Parameter Assignments

description.summary: Validate parameter template definitions and part parameter assignments via API.
description.general_description: API must support creation of parameter templates, assignment of parameters to parts, validation of parameter data types, and enforcement of uniqueness constraints.
description.business_value: Enables structured parametric part specifications for search, comparison, and compliance tracking.
preconditions: Parameter templates exist or can be created

scenarios.name: Create parameter template
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/parameter/template/ creates a template with name="Voltage" and units="V"

description.expected_result: Parameter templates and assignments are validated.
acceptance_criteria: Parameter templates can be created with name, units, data type
Parameters can be assigned to parts with proper values
Duplicate parameters per part are prevented
Data type validation is enforced
Parameter values can be updated and deleted

stories.summary: API: Implement and Validate Pagination Controls for Parts

description.summary: Implement comprehensive pagination, offset, and limit controls for Part list API endpoint.
description.general_description: API must support pagination parameters (page, page_size, limit, offset) and return proper metadata for navigating large result sets.
description.business_value: Enables efficient retrieval of large part inventories and improves client application performance.
preconditions: Large dataset of parts exists (100+ parts recommended for testing)

scenarios.name: Retrieve first page with default page size
scenarios.when: a GET request to /api/part/ is made without pagination params
scenarios.then: the API returns first page with default page size (e.g., 25)

description.expected_result: Pagination operates correctly with proper metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Default pagination is applied when no params specified
Custom page and page_size parameters work correctly
Offset and limit parameters work correctly
Response includes: count (total), next (URL), previous (URL)
Out-of-range pages return empty results, not errors
Invalid pagination params return 400 with clear errors

stories.summary: API: Implement Full-Text Search for Parts

description.summary: Implement full-text and field-specific search capabilities for Parts API.
description.general_description: API must support searching parts by name, description, IPN, keywords across multiple fields with relevance ranking.
description.business_value: Enables users to quickly find parts using natural search queries, improving inventory discoverability.
preconditions: Parts with varied names, descriptions, and IPNs exist

scenarios.name: Search by part name
scenarios.when: a GET request with ?search=resistor is made
scenarios.then: only parts with "resistor" in name are returned

description.expected_result: Search returns relevant parts with proper matching.
acceptance_criteria: Search parameter works across name, description, IPN fields
Search is case-insensitive
Partial matches are supported
Empty search term returns all parts (or error)
Search can be combined with filters and pagination
No results returns 200 with empty array, not 404

stories.summary: API: Implement Field-Specific Filtering for Parts

description.summary: Implement comprehensive field-specific filtering for Parts API (active, category, template, salable, purchaseable, assembly, etc.).
description.general_description: API must support filtering parts by all boolean flags, category, and other attributes with proper query parameter handling.
description.business_value: Enables precise part queries for specific use cases (e.g., "show only active, purchaseable parts in Electronics category").
preconditions: Parts exist with diverse attribute combinations

scenarios.name: Filter by active status
scenarios.given: parts exist with active=true and active=false
scenarios.when: a GET request with ?active=true is made

description.expected_result: All attribute filters work individually and in combination.
acceptance_criteria: All boolean attributes can be filtered (active, template, assembly, component, trackable, purchaseable, salable, virtual)
Category filter accepts category ID
Multiple filters can be combined with AND logic
Invalid filter values are handled gracefully
Filters work correctly with pagination and search

stories.summary: API: Implement Sorting/Ordering for Parts List

description.summary: Implement sorting/ordering capabilities for Parts API list endpoint.
description.general_description: API must support ordering results by various fields (name, IPN, category, creation date, etc.) in ascending or descending order.
description.business_value: Enables organized result presentation and helps users find parts based on sort priority.

scenarios.name: Sort by name ascending
scenarios.when: a GET request with ?ordering=name is made
scenarios.then: parts are returned sorted A-Z by name

description.expected_result: Ordering operates correctly for all supported fields.
acceptance_criteria: Ascending order uses field name (e.g., ?ordering=name)
Descending order uses minus prefix (e.g., ?ordering=-name)
Supported ordering fields include: name, IPN, category, created, updated
Multi-field sorting is supported
Ordering works correctly with filters, search, and pagination
Invalid ordering fields are rejected or ignored gracefully

stories.summary: API: Validate Authentication and Authorization Controls

description.summary: Validate authentication and authorization controls for all Parts API endpoints.
description.general_description: API must enforce authentication (valid token/session required) and authorization (user permissions) for all operations, returning proper HTTP status codes for violations.
description.business_value: Protects sensitive inventory data and ensures only authorized users can modify parts.

scenarios.name: Access API without authentication
scenarios.when: any request is made to /api/part/

description.expected_result: Authentication and authorization are enforced consistently.
acceptance_criteria: 401 returned for missing/invalid authentication
403 returned for insufficient permissions
All endpoints require authentication
Role-based access control (RBAC) is enforced
Permission checks apply to: read, create, update, delete operations
Error messages do not leak sensitive system information

stories.summary: API: Validate Error Handling for Malformed Requests

description.summary: Validate API error handling for malformed requests, invalid JSON, and unexpected inputs.
description.general_description: API must gracefully handle malformed requests with proper HTTP status codes and descriptive error messages without exposing system internals.
description.business_value: Ensures API robustness, improves client debugging, and prevents security vulnerabilities from error information leakage.

scenarios.name: Send malformed JSON
scenarios.when: a POST request with invalid JSON syntax is sent (e.g., missing closing brace)

description.expected_result: All error scenarios return appropriate HTTP codes and helpful messages.
acceptance_criteria: Malformed JSON returns 400 with JSON parse error
Wrong content type returns 415 or 400
Type mismatches return 400 with field-specific error
Non-existent resources return 404
Empty required bodies return 400
Error responses follow consistent format (e.g., {"error": "...", "detail": "..."})
No stack traces or internal paths exposed in errors

stories.summary: API: Validate HTTP Status Code Accuracy

description.summary: Validate HTTP status code accuracy for all Parts API operations (2xx, 4xx, 5xx).
description.general_description: API must return semantically correct HTTP status codes for all operations: 200/201/204 for success, 400 for client errors, 404 for not found, 409 for conflicts, 500 for server errors.
description.business_value: Ensures API compliance with REST standards and enables proper client-side error handling.
preconditions: Understanding of HTTP status code semantics

scenarios.name: Successful resource creation
scenarios.when: a POST request creates a part

description.expected_result: All operations return semantically correct status codes.
acceptance_criteria: 200 OK for successful GET/PATCH/PUT
201 Created for successful POST (with Location header)
204 No Content for successful DELETE
400 Bad Request for validation errors
401 Unauthorized for auth failures
403 Forbidden for permission denials
404 Not Found for missing resources
405 Method Not Allowed for unsupported HTTP methods
409 Conflict for constraint violations (optional, 400 acceptable)
500 Internal Server Error for unexpected server failures

stories.summary: API: Validate Response Schema Consistency

description.summary: Validate API response schema consistency and field presence for all Parts endpoints.
description.general_description: API responses must conform to documented schemas with consistent field names, data types, and structure across all endpoints.
description.business_value: Ensures reliable client integration and prevents breaking changes from inconsistent response formats.

scenarios.name: Verify list response schema
scenarios.when: a GET request to /api/part/ is made
scenarios.then: response contains: count, next, previous, results array

description.expected_result: All responses match documented schemas consistently.
acceptance_criteria: List responses include pagination metadata
Detail responses contain all documented fields
Field names are consistent across endpoints
Data types match documentation (no string where integer expected)
Null handling is consistent (explicit null vs field omission)
Error responses follow consistent structure
Response schemas validated with JSON Schema or OpenAPI spec

stories.summary: API: Validate Referential Integrity on Part Deletion

description.summary: Validate that part deletion respects referential integrity and prevents orphaned references.
description.general_description: API must prevent deletion of parts that are referenced by BOMs, stock items, purchase orders, or other entities, or cascade delete properly per business rules.
description.business_value: Prevents data corruption and maintains referential integrity across inventory system.

scenarios.name: Delete part with no dependencies
scenarios.given: a part exists with no references
scenarios.when: a DELETE request is sent

description.expected_result: Deletion enforces referential integrity per business rules.
acceptance_criteria: Cannot delete parts referenced in BOMs
Cannot delete parts with active stock
Cannot delete template parts with variants
Cannot delete parts with revisions
Parts with attachments/parameters can be deleted (cascade or block per config)
Error messages clearly identify blocking references
Successfully deleted parts return 204

stories.summary: API: Validate Part Attachment Upload and Management

description.summary: Validate part attachment upload, retrieval, metadata, and file type restrictions via API.
description.general_description: API must support file attachment operations with proper validation of file size, type, and metadata handling.
description.business_value: Enables document/image association with parts for datasheets, drawings, compliance docs.
preconditions: File size and type restrictions defined

scenarios.name: Upload valid file attachment
scenarios.when: a POST multipart/form-data request uploads a PDF file to /api/part/{id}/attachment/

description.expected_result: Attachment operations work with proper validation.
acceptance_criteria: Valid files upload successfully
File size limits are enforced
File type restrictions are enforced
Metadata (comment, filename) is stored and retrievable
Attachment list returns all files with metadata
Files can be downloaded with correct headers
Attachments can be deleted
Storage cleanup occurs on deletion

stories.summary: API: Validate Related Parts Link Management

description.summary: Validate related parts link creation, symmetry, and constraint enforcement via API.
description.general_description: API must support creating part-to-part relationships (related/substitute/complementary) with validation to prevent self-references, duplicates, and optionally enforce bi-directional links.
description.business_value: Enables tracking of part relationships for substitution, cross-selling, and compatibility.

scenarios.name: Create related part link
scenarios.given: Part A and Part B exist
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/{A}/related/ links to Part B

description.expected_result: Related part links are validated and managed correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Related part links can be created between valid parts
Self-references are blocked
Duplicate relationships are prevented
Invalid part references are rejected
Relationships can be listed and deleted
Bi-directional linking enforced if required by business rules

stories.summary: API: Validate Bulk/Batch Operations for Parts

description.summary: Validate bulk/batch operations for parts (bulk create, update, delete) via API.
description.general_description: API should support bulk operations to efficiently process multiple parts in a single request, with proper error handling for partial failures.
description.business_value: Enables efficient data import, migration, and batch updates without N individual API calls.

scenarios.name: Bulk create multiple parts
scenarios.when: a POST request with array of 10 part objects is sent to bulk endpoint

description.expected_result: Bulk operations process efficiently with clear success/failure reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Bulk create/update/delete endpoints are available (or documented as unsupported)
Requests accept array of objects/IDs
Batch size limits are enforced
Partial failures are clearly reported
Response indicates success/failure per item
Atomic vs non-atomic behavior is documented and consistent
Performance is significantly better than N individual requests

stories.summary: API: Validate Test Template Assignment to Parts

description.summary: Validate test template assignment and management for parts via API.
description.general_description: API must support linking test templates to parts, defining test requirements, and managing test template relationships per business rules.
description.business_value: Enables quality control and testing workflow integration with part definitions.

scenarios.name: Assign test template to part
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/part/{A}/test-template/ assigns the template

description.expected_result: Test template assignments are validated and managed.
acceptance_criteria: Test templates can be assigned to parts
Duplicate assignments are prevented
Invalid template references are rejected
Template assignments can be listed and removed
Applicability rules are enforced (if defined)
Test template data includes required test parameters

stories.summary: API: Validate Part Pricing and Supplier/Manufacturer Linkage

description.summary: Validate part pricing and supplier/manufacturer linkage via API.
description.general_description: API must support associating parts with suppliers, manufacturers, pricing data, and validate these relationships per business rules.
description.business_value: Enables procurement workflows and cost tracking for inventory parts.

scenarios.name: Link supplier to part
scenarios.when: a POST request to /api/company/part/ links Supplier X to Part A with SKU

description.expected_result: Supplier/manufacturer links and pricing are managed correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Supplier/manufacturer links can be created for parts
Purchaseable flag is validated for supplier links
SKU and MPN can be stored and updated
Pricing data supports quantity breaks
Multiple suppliers per part are supported
Supplier/manufacturer lists can be retrieved per part
Links can be removed without deleting part or supplier

stories.summary: API: Validate Stock Location Assignment for Parts

description.summary: Validate stock location assignment and default location configuration for parts via API.
description.general_description: API must support setting default stock locations for parts and validate location references for stock tracking integration.
description.business_value: Streamlines stock receiving and tracking by pre-defining where parts should be stored.

scenarios.name: Set default location for part
scenarios.when: a PATCH request sets default_location="Warehouse A" for Part A

description.expected_result: Default locations are managed and validated correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Default location can be set via PATCH
Invalid location references are rejected
Default location can be cleared (set to null)
Default location is returned in part detail response
Parts can be filtered by default location
Default location does not restrict stock placement (it's a suggestion/default)

stories.summary: API: Validate Part Image Upload and Management

description.summary: Validate part image/thumbnail upload, retrieval, and primary image designation via API.
description.general_description: API must support uploading images for parts, designating primary image, and serving thumbnails with proper image handling.
description.business_value: Enables visual part identification and improves user experience in inventory browsing.
preconditions: Image file types and size limits defined

scenarios.name: Upload image for part
scenarios.when: a POST multipart request uploads PNG image to /api/part/{A}/image/

description.expected_result: Image upload and management work with proper validation.
acceptance_criteria: Image files (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP) can be uploaded
Non-image files are rejected
File size limits are enforced
Primary image can be designated
Images are returned with part details
Thumbnails are auto-generated and accessible
Images can be deleted with storage cleanup

stories.summary: API: Validate Part Notes and Metadata Management

description.summary: Validate part notes and metadata management via API.
description.general_description: API must support adding, updating, retrieving, and deleting free-form notes and metadata fields for parts.
description.business_value: Enables capturing additional context, history, and unstructured information about parts.

scenarios.name: Add note to part
scenarios.when: a POST request adds note="Supplier changed packaging" to /api/part/{A}/notes/

description.expected_result: Notes and metadata are managed with proper validation.
acceptance_criteria: Notes can be added with text, timestamp, and user attribution
All notes for a part can be retrieved
Notes can be updated and deleted
Empty notes are rejected
Custom metadata fields are supported (if applicable)
Notes include create/update timestamps

stories.summary: API: Validate Part Import/Export Operations

description.summary: Validate part import/export operations via API (CSV, JSON, bulk data exchange).
description.general_description: API must support exporting parts data in standard formats and importing parts from external sources with validation and error reporting.
description.business_value: Enables data migration, backup, integration with external systems, and bulk data management.

scenarios.name: Export parts to JSON
scenarios.when: a GET request to /api/part/export/?format=json is made
scenarios.then: the API returns parts data as JSON file

description.expected_result: Import/export operations work with proper validation and reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Parts can be exported to JSON and CSV formats
Export respects filters and pagination
Parts can be imported from structured files
Import validates all records before processing (or reports per-record errors)
Duplicate and invalid records are reported clearly
Dry-run mode available for validation without commit
Import response includes success/failure summary
